title: Teaching Metric Spaces Concepts: Chalk & Talk vs. PowerPoint
description: A flowchart comparing the teaching-learning process for a Metric Spaces topic using the traditional Chalk & Talk method versus a modern PowerPoint Presentation.
relationships: Instructor begins the process and chooses a path
Chalk & Talk Path leads to dynamic, paced derivation but potential note-taking fatigue
PowerPoint Path leads to structured, visual presentation but potential passive learning
Both paths require strategies to achieve Student Engagement
Effective Engagement from either path leads to Concept Internalization
